title: rubus althaeifolius
intro: Rubus althaeifolius, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to the Himalayas. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus althaeifolius, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water, and the plant is also used in traditional medicine to create various remedies.
